title: Oil prices fall below $100 as U.S.-Iran tensions keep traders focused on Strait of Hormuz risks
summary_full: Oil prices fell Thursday, as investors continue to assess the latest developments in the Middle East amid concerns over renewed tensions between Iran and the U.S.
summary_public: Oil prices fell Thursday, as investors continue to assess the latest developments in the Middle East amid concerns over renewed tensions between Iran and the U.S.

IR.label: neutral
